[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Machel Kendy''' was a [[Police officer/Legends|security officer]] in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. He was Grand Master of [[K'thri]] as was his stepfather, who taught him this art from Kendy's earliest age.<ref name="TLCs" /> Head of one of the squads investigating [[Delta Source]], he informed [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] that a [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|third party]] was tapping into their [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] conversation. He was seemingly disappointed that they were intentionally holding a three-way conversation.<ref name="TLC" />
